title: paspalum goyasense
intro: Paspalum goyasense is a type of tropical grass, native to South America, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum goyasense include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and itching. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
